holdings.infoBox: STNC is an equity ETF with a total of 48 individual holdings. The top holdings are Intel stock at 5.30%, Applied Materials at 4.20%, Jabil at 3.60%, Lam Research at 3.40%, and Ross Stores at 3.10%.

overview.description: The Hennessy Sustainable ETF (STNC) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively-managed, non-transparent ETF that holds a concentrated portfolio of US stocks screened for sustainability criteria. The fund utilizes the Blue Tractor non-transparent model. STNC was launched on Mar 16, 2021 and is issued by Hennessy.
